classes.label: Employment Unit
classes.description: An organization or employer providing job positions and related benefits.
evidence: 用人单位用 人形式码

classes.label: Job Position
classes.description: A specific role or post within an employment unit.

classes.label: Graduate Placement
classes.description: Information regarding the assignment and reporting details of a graduate.

classes.label: Award
classes.description: A recognition or prize given to an individual for a specific achievement.

classes.label: Disciplinary Action
classes.description: A penalty or sanction imposed on an individual by an organization or authority.

datatype_properties.label: Unit Economic Nature Code
datatype_properties.description: Code representing the economic nature of the unit.

datatype_properties.label: Unit Provided Benefits
datatype_properties.description: Benefits provided by the unit.

datatype_properties.label: Unit Industry Code
datatype_properties.description: Code representing the industry of the unit.

datatype_properties.label: Employer Employment Form Code
datatype_properties.description: Code representing the employment form of the employer.
evidence: 用人单位用 人形式码

datatype_properties.label: Job Position Nature Code
datatype_properties.description: Code representing the nature of the job position.

datatype_properties.label: Archive Receipt Address
datatype_properties.description: Address where the archive is received.

datatype_properties.label: Receipt Postal Code
datatype_properties.description: Postal code of the receipt location.

datatype_properties.label: Registration Certificate Number
datatype_properties.description: Number of the registration certificate.

datatype_properties.label: Dispatch Fee
datatype_properties.description: Fee for dispatch.

datatype_properties.label: Award Project Name
datatype_properties.description: Name of the project that received the award.

datatype_properties.label: Award Level Code
datatype_properties.description: Code representing the level of the award.

datatype_properties.label: Award Grade Code
datatype_properties.description: Code representing the grade of the award.

datatype_properties.label: Award Category Code
datatype_properties.description: Code representing the category of the award.

datatype_properties.label: Award Method Code
datatype_properties.description: Code representing the method of the award.

datatype_properties.label: Award Name
datatype_properties.description: Name of the award.

datatype_properties.label: Award Name Code
datatype_properties.description: Code representing the name of the award.

datatype_properties.label: Award Reason
datatype_properties.description: Reason for receiving the award.

datatype_properties.label: Award Content
datatype_properties.description: Specific content description of the award.

datatype_properties.label: Awarding Unit
datatype_properties.description: Name of the unit that granted the award.

datatype_properties.label: Award Date
datatype_properties.description: Date the award was issued.

datatype_properties.label: Honorary Title Code
datatype_properties.description: Code representing the honorary title.

datatype_properties.label: Award Role Code
datatype_properties.description: Code representing the individual's role in the awarded project.

datatype_properties.label: Disciplinary Name
datatype_properties.description: Name of the disciplinary action.

datatype_properties.label: Disciplinary Code
datatype_properties.description: Code representing the disciplinary action.

datatype_properties.label: Disciplinary Reason
datatype_properties.description: Reason for the disciplinary action.

datatype_properties.label: Disciplinary Content
datatype_properties.description: Specific content of the disciplinary action.

datatype_properties.label: Disciplinary Unit
datatype_properties.description: Name of the organization that imposed the disciplinary action.

datatype_properties.label: Disciplinary Document Number
datatype_properties.description: Document number of the disciplinary action.

datatype_properties.label: Disciplinary Date
datatype_properties.description: Date the disciplinary action was imposed.

datatype_properties.label: Disciplinary Revocation Date
datatype_properties.description: Date the disciplinary action was revoked.

object_properties.label: Has Job Position
object_properties.description: Relates an employment unit to a job position.

object_properties.label: Has Graduate Placement
object_properties.description: Relates an employment unit to a graduate placement.

object_properties.label: Has Award
object_properties.description: Relates an employment unit to an award.

object_properties.label: Has Disciplinary Action
object_properties.description: Relates an employment unit to a disciplinary action.
